steps.title: Multiply both sides by 6 to clear the fraction
steps.content: Start with $$\frac{5x}{6} = 30$$. Multiply both sides by 6 to eliminate the denominator: $$6 \cdot \frac{5x}{6} = 30 \cdot 6$$. This simplifies to $$5x = 180$$.

steps.title: Divide both sides by 5 to isolate x
steps.content: From $$5x = 180$$, divide both sides by 5: $$x = \frac{180}{5} = 36$$. That confirms A is correct.
